name: Arizer Frosted Glass Balloon Mouthpiece
summary: Arizer Frosted Glass Balloon Mouthpiece — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The updated frosted mouthpiece allows for convenient mounting of your balloon to the vaporiser without a hose, when used in conjunction with the "All Glass Mini Whip" option for the XQ2 and Extreme Q models. The seamless transitions between parts make for effortless cleaning. **Please note Balloons are sold separately This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
